basic_details.job_title: RRI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 22 Engineer, Tradesman and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Engineer C, Engineer B, Engineering Assistant C, Tradesman A
basic_details.short_information: Raman Research Institute (RRI) has officially announced the Engineer C, Engineer B, Engineering Assistant C, Tradesman A Recruitment 2026 with 22 openings. The detailed notification was published on 01-07-2026 at the official website www.rri.res.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria (maximum 35 years for some posts and 28 years for others) and hold qualifications such as M.Sc or Engineering degree in Electronics with first class and relevant experience, M.Tech in Electronics with first class, M.Sc./Engineering degree in Mechanical or Instrumentation with first class, relevant diplomas (Elec

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age limit is 35 years for some posts and 28 years for others.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 35 years for some posts and 28 years for others. Age relaxation available for SC/ST/OBC candidates for reserved vacancies as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc or Engineering degree in Electronics with first class & three years’ of relevant experience / M.Tech Degree in Electronics with First class marks, M.Sc. or Engineering degree in Electronics with first class, M.Sc. or Mechanical Engineering with first class, M.Sc. or Engineering degree in Instrumentation with first class, Diploma in Electronics Engineering, Diploma in Mechanical Engineering, Diploma in Computer Science / Information Technology, Diploma in Civil Engineering, Diploma in Electrical Engineering, ITI in Electrical, ITI in Air Conditioning, ITI in Mechanical, ITI in Fitter / Turner / Machinist
qualification.details: Engineer C - Electronics: M.Sc or Engineering degree in Electronics with first class & three years’ of relevant experience / M.Tech Degree in Electronics with First class marks. Engineer B - Electronics: M.Sc. or Engineering degree in Electronics with first class. Engineer B - Mechanical: M.Sc. or Mechanical Engineering with first class. Engineer B - Instrumentation: M.Sc. or Engineering degree in Instrumentation with first class. Engineering Assistant C - Electronics: Diploma in Electronics Engineering. Engineering Assistant C - Mechanical: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering. Engineering Assistant C - IT: Diploma in Computer Science / Information Technology. Engineering Assistant C - Civil: Diploma in Civil Engineering. Engineering Assistant C - Electrical: Diploma in Electrical Engineering. Tradesman A - Electrical: ITI in Electrical. Tradesman A - AC Mechanic: ITI in Air Conditioning. Tradesman A - Mechanical: ITI in Mechanical. Tradesman A - Fitter/Turner/Machinist: ITI in Fitter / Turner / Machinist.

salary_details.details: Engineer C - Electronics: Pay Level 11 Engineer B - Electronics: Pay Level 10 Engineer B - Mechanical: Pay Level 10 Engineer B - Instrumentation: Pay Level 10 Engineering Assistant C - Electronics: Pay Level 5 Engineering Assistant C - Mechanical: Pay Level 5 Engineering Assistant C - IT: Pay Level 5 Engineering Assistant C - Civil: Pay Level 5 Engineering Assistant C - Electrical: Pay Level 5 Tradesman A - Electrical: Pay Level 2 Tradesman A - AC Mechanic: Pay Level 2 Tradesman A - Mechanical: Pay Level 2 Tradesman A - Fitter/Turner/Machinist: Pay Level 2

selection_process: Objective test Subjective test Interview Skill test
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

Maximum age limit is 35 years for some posts and 28 years for others.

content_sections.heading: RRI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RRI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download RRI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RRI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Engineer C - Electronics: M.Sc or Engineering degree in Electronics with first class & three years’ of relevant experience / M.Tech Degree in Electronics with First class marks. Engineer B - Electronics: M.Sc. or Engineering degree in Electronics with first class. Engineer B - Mechanical: M.Sc. or Mechanical Engineering with first class. Engineer B - Instrumentation: M.Sc. or Engineering degree in Instrumentation with first class. Engineering Assistant C - Electronics: Diploma in Electronics Engineering. Engineering Assistant C - Mechanical: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering. Engineering Assistant C - IT: Diploma in Computer Science / Information Technology. Engineering Assistant C - Civil: Diploma in Civil Engineering. Engineering Assistant C - Electrical: Diploma in Electrical Engineering. Tradesman A - Electrical: ITI in Electrical. Tradesman A - AC Mechanic: ITI in Air Conditioning. Tradesman A - Mechanical: ITI in Mechanical. Tradesman A - Fitter/Turner/Machinist: ITI in Fitter / Turner / Machinist.

content_sections.heading: RRI Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit is 35 years for some posts and 28 years for others. Age relaxation available for SC/ST/OBC candidates for reserved vacancies as per rules.

content_sections.heading: RRI Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Engineer C - Electronics: Pay Level 11 Engineer B - Electronics: Pay Level 10 Engineer B - Mechanical: Pay Level 10 Engineer B - Instrumentation: Pay Level 10 Engineering Assistant C - Electronics: Pay Level 5 Engineering Assistant C - Mechanical: Pay Level 5 Engineering Assistant C - IT: Pay Level 5 Engineering Assistant C - Civil: Pay Level 5 Engineering Assistant C - Electrical: Pay Level 5 Tradesman A - Electrical: Pay Level 2 Tradesman A - AC Mechanic: Pay Level 2 Tradesman A - Mechanical: Pay Level 2 Tradesman A - Fitter/Turner/Machinist: Pay Level 2

content_sections.heading: RRI Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Objective test Subjective test Interview Skill test

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RRI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Raman Research Institute Recruitment 2026 is July 31, 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in RRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Raman Research Institute has announced a total of 22 vacancies for various posts including Engineer C, Engineer B, Engineering Assistant C, and Tradesman A.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for RRI Jobs 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies by post, ranging from ITI certificates in relevant trades to Diploma in Engineering and M.Sc. or Engineering degrees with first-class marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to RRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years for some posts and 28 years for others. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for RRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is 250 for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for RRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically includes an objective test, a subjective test, an interview, and a skill test, depending on the post applied for.

faq.question: Q7. In which mode can I apply for RRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for the Raman Research Institute Recruitment 2026 must be submitted through the online mode only. Ensure you use the official application portal.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates in RRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary will be based on the Pay Level as per the 7th Central Pay Commission, with specific levels ranging from Level 11 for Engineer C down to Level 2 for Tradesman A.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official RRI Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article or from the Raman Research Institute's official website.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories in RRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC candidates applying for reserved vacancies, in accordance with the rules and regulations set by the government.
